falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Disprove that partial D1 missing score units were only blocked by upstream rubric failure.
falsificationQueries: Check whether missing score units exist outside the three failed samples.
Inspect one failed sample for direct score-stage targets or requests.
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: All missing score units are concentrated in exactly three fully failed samples, and a targeted missing unit has no score target or score request because the rubric target exhausted upstream.
